"reason": "Code demo", "context": "Shows Python implementation"}]}If the video is not about AI/tech, set aiConcepts and technicalDetails to empty arrays but still extract keyPoints.TRANSCRIPT:bankless Nation welcome to the AI rollup where we cover the recent news developments and drama this is the intersection of two very exciting Frontier Technologies both crypto and AI we've got curious and creative developers that are playing around with these open-source AI agents this open source software gives them access to crypto wallets and unleashes them into the wild west of the internet including the crypto internet so we are doing a special series of episodes on Bank list with a special co-host ezz to help make sure you guys are up to speed on what we think is one of the craziest and fastest Frontiers we've ever seen in all of our crypto experience David is out today so I'm fulfilling the role of of co-host and I am less AI agent savvy than David is so the benefit of this is e Jazz you're going to get all the Boomer questions today how are you doing this week man I'm doing so well um I feel like I say this every week but I think each week literally gets crazier in this space I have been non-stop 24/7 reading all these updates on all these new agents and Frameworks that have been launching and I'm excited to crack into a few new ones today um yeah super excited so I've been tuning into these AI uh rollups cuz it's like honestly it is the best way to stay up to speed on the frontier so I've listened to all three this is now our fourth in the series and we're going to keep doing them into 2025 right even I think you you guys are recording during the holidays right you're doing like one the week of Christmas so this show don't stop Christmas MH um a few things we're talking about today I scan the agenda I hav't looked at everything but uh virtuals seem like they're absolutely killing it so 35 million in fees so far always impresses me to see fees in these protocols and most of that by the way is in the last two weeks so I want you to tell me about that also AI 16z partnering with Stanford University that is a legacy we are uh we also have agent this was really exciting to me that is earning eth through staking so now they're spinning up their own validators so you got to fill me in on all of that but here's the question David always asks you at the beginning of these episodes that I want to ask you why is this whole thing such a big deal like why are AI agents the next Frontier why are you spending so much time on it why should we spend the time that we're spending on it like what's the bull case here well I actually saw this tweet the other day which summarized it kind of perfectly and I I want us to pull it up here um it basically describes AI agents as the new website so let's kind of like dig into to what this means exactly right so you know how back in the day Ryan you had to know the exact address of a website if you wanted to go to it remember You' need to type www. blah blah blah you'd find these websites maybe on the back of Serial boxes or in the index pages of newspapers you know very manual stuff and then these things like Google came along and they allowed you to kind of discover websites in a much easier fashion right you could search up recipes or find a story about someone and read up about them right so it made the discovery process of websites super easy and around this same era um a lot of people that went on the internet could do different things they could post images they could write blogs they could respond to blogs with comments that was the read write part of uh the internet right now we have these agents which not only combine these two Trends so the discovery process and the ability to write to the internet but they do it autonomously and they have a self-improvement mechanism which means that they get better and better over time and that in my opinion is a recipe for an entirely new internet experience right so right now you know you and I we look at a computer screen or we pick up our phone to interact with the internet what if we just had to speak what if we just had to think and we had these agents that would understand the context of what we're asking about and do things without us even asking or even uttering a word um right now it kind of looks like interfacing with chat GPT um tomorrow it might be just speak or say something and an agent will do something um it's pretty crazy to think about the way I kind of think about this evolving is today um I think agents will live across the entirety of our social media right so you might go on social media accounts like Twitter or Instagram and your agents are going to going to be there maybe your email account your agent's going to be there bank account crypto wallet your agent's going to be there so it can start doing things across all facets of your online experience and then I think step two is homepage you would log on to chat gbt or another kind of interface and say hey um this is what I want to do today get it done for me and uh I think that's a pretty exciting way to think about agents editmore_vert{"summary": "This episode of the Bankless AI Rollup explores the rapid evolution of AI agents as autonomous economic actors that can interact with both the physical world and the blockchain. The hosts discuss the shift toward an agent-centric internet where AI-to-AI commerce and autonomous task execution redefine the traditional 'website' model.","keyPoints": ["AI agents are described as the 'new website,' shifting the internet from manual search to autonomous discovery and action.","A developer successfully programmed an agent using the Eliza framework to autonomously order a Domino's pizza using a credit card.","The 'Agent Tank' project demonstrated an agent using computer vision to navigate Amazon and purchase toilet paper based on analytical criteria.","A milestone in agent-to-agent commerce occurred when the AI agent Luna paid another agent, Agent Sticks, $1 to generate an image.","AI agents are becoming economic actors that can tip humans, evidenced by an agent sending $500 to the Bankless team for a mention.","The concept of the 'automate' verb is introduced as the next phase of the internet (Web 4) following read, write, and own."],"aiConcepts": ["Autonomous AI Agents","Computer Vision","Agent-to-Agent Commerce","Self-improvement mechanisms","Agentic Frameworks","AI Influencers"],"technicalDetails": ["Eliza Framework (AI16z)","Virtuals Protocol","Claude/Anthropic Computer Use API","On-chain crypto wallets","Open-source AI development (Nous Research)","Mastercard/Stripe agent integrations"],"visualContextFlags": [{"timestamp": 480, "reason": "Code and UI demo", "context": "Shows Rito AI agent logs and the Domino's ordering interface"},{"timestamp": 645, "reason": "Agent browser interaction", "context": "Video of DJ Spartan agent using computer vision to shop on Amazon"},{"timestamp": 840, "reason": "Social media proof", "context": "Screenshot of the on-chain commerce transaction between Luna and Agent Sticks"}]}thumb_upthumb_down
